pages.title: About - Liz Kendall MP - Liz Kendall
headings: h2: I'm Liz Kendall, the MP for Leicester West.
pages.text_excerpt: About - Liz Kendall MP - Liz Kendall Skip to main content Liz Kendall Working hard for Leicester West Join Get Involved Donate About My Role Local News National News Parliamentary Business Contact Other help and advice Archive More Menu About I'm Liz Kendall, the MP for Leicester West. I have been the Labour MP for Leicester West since 2010. Since 2025, I have been Secretary of State for Science, Innovation and Technology. Prior to this, I was Secretary of State for Work and Pensions. Before Labour came into government in 2024, I had been the Shadow Secretary of State for Work and Pensions. Prior to becoming an MP, I held a number positions in the think-tank and charities sector. I was Director of The Maternity Alliance (now Maternity Action), a national charity that promotes the health and well-being of pregnant women, their partners and young children. In this role, I campaigned for improved maternity and paternity rights, and more rights to flexible working. I have also been Director of the Ambulance Service Network, for whom I worked alongside patients’ groups and NHS staff to ensure full access to good emergency care services. I also held the position of Associate Director of the Institute for Public Policy Research, where I led on health, social care and children’s early years, and I was also a researcher at the King’s Fund where I focused on measures aimed at tackling local health inequalities. Get in touch Liz Kendall Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Sarah Russell on behalf of Liz Kendall, all at Unite the Union, East Midlands Region, Friars Mill, Riverside Building, 102 Bath Lane, Leicester LE3 5BJ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Contact - Liz Kendall MP - Liz Kendall
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Liz Kendall MP - Liz Kendall Skip to main content Liz Kendall Working hard for Leicester West Join Get Involved Donate About My Role Local News National News Parliamentary Business Contact Other help and advice Archive More Menu Contact Get in touch Your MP Leicester West [email protected] Leicester West residents My team are here to help with any casework issues you may have. When you email please ensure you include: your full name your home address including postcode your contact telephone number any relevant reference numbers (such as a national insurance number or a complaint number) details about the issue you are facing If you are contacting me about a policy or campaign issue, I aim to respond within 20 working days, but please note that this can vary. DSIT queries If you do not live in Leicester West and wish to contact me in my role as Secretary of State, please send your email to [email protected] or fill in the contact form here: Correspondence for ministerial support You can also contact your MP to ask them to raise your issue on your behalf. You can find their contact details here: Find your MP – MPs and Lords – UK Parliament Get in touch Write to: Liz Kendall MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Email [email protected] Follow on social media Liz Kendall Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Sarah Russell on behalf of Liz Kendall, all at Unite the Union, East Midlands Region, Friars Mill, Riverside Building, 102 Bath Lane, Leicester LE3 5BJ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. Are you a leaseholder fed up with unclear, excessive service charges? This Labour Government is acting. Have your say in our consultation to deliver stronger rights and fairer charges for nearly 5 million leaseholders. https://www.gov.uk/government/consultations/strengthening-leaseholder-protections-over-charges-and-services-consultation Liz Kendall Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Sarah Russell on behalf of Liz Kendall, all at Unite the Union, East Midlands Region, Friars Mill, Riverside Building, 102 Bath Lane, Leicester LE3 5BJ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
